title: The Ancient Mariner
writer: Chester Barnett, Samuel Taylor Coleridge, Tom Miranda
actors: Buck Black, Barbara Boudwin, Jimmy Boudwin
plot: Doris Matthews, a beautiful, innocent young woman, forsakes her sweetheart, Joel Barlowe, in favor of Victor Brant, a wealthy roué. On the night before they are to elope, an old sailor gives Brant a strange potion to drink and the...
